storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC002

## Production Intent
Execute the physical transition of the farmhouse from a grounded structure to an airborne vessel via high-pressure wind forces. The sequence requires tight synchronization between interior chaos (flying objects/dust) and exterior VFX (lifting house/cyclone void).

## Required Cast
- dorothy (young human girl, white clothing)
- toto (indirectly)

## Required Environments
- farmhouse_interior_and_cellar (Kansas prairie setting)
- cyclone_storm_void (high-altitude/spinning clouds)

## Continuity Constraints
- Interior objects must fly in consistent wind direction
- Rapid light level shifts (spinning through clouds)
- Dust and debris movement patterns

## Beat List
- BT001: Dorothy attempts to reach the cellar as wind builds.
- BT002: The cyclone strikes the house, causing interior chaos.
- BT003: The house is ripped from foundations and lifted into the air.
